meaning: n.(鲸等的)呼吸孔,喷水孔,通风孔,通气孔
examples: Never pour water in the blowhole!
Do not cover the stranded whale's blowhole!
The area around the blowhole is also particularly sensitive and captive animals often object strongly to being touched there.
We heard the expelling of air through a blowhole and tracked down a humpback, watching as her dorsal fin arched out of the water.
Its blowhole spray shot into the air.
